title: KV Projekt 2025
description: A vanilla-esk modpack featuring new terrain generation and many QOL changes adding to the minecraft experience.
body: This modpack features new terrain generation through combining and tweaking terralith and Tectonic. New experiences are created with mods like origins or Friends and Foes. Because the terrain is now huge in comparison to vanilla minecraft, with mountains spanning over many thousands of blocks, there are plenty of mods to help you to adventure over this new world.
